page.title: APN Settings
page.description: Set the APN, IP protocol, and data context your SIM uses to connect.

card.title: APN Configuration
card.description: The Access Point Name the modem uses to establish a data connection.

apn.save_connection_notice: Saving briefly drops the cellular connection while the modem reconnects.

dialog.title: Use carrier default APN?
dialog.description: Your carrier will choose the APN automatically. The cellular connection will drop briefly while the modem reconnects.

toast.deactivate_error: Failed to revert to carrier default

live.mismatch_default: Network is using the carrier default

cid_confirm.title: Use a reserved context?
cid_confirm.description_ims: CID {{cid}} is reserved by your carrier for IMS (VoLTE / Wi-Fi calling). Writing a data APN here can disrupt voice calling. Continue anyway?
cid_confirm.description_sos: CID {{cid}} is reserved for emergency (SOS) calling. Writing a data APN here can disrupt emergency calls. Continue anyway?

page.title: Custom SIM Profile
page.description: Bundle APN, IMEI, and TTL/HL settings into one-click profiles.
page.error_load_failed: Could not load profiles. Check the connection and try again.

view.title: Saved Profiles
view.subtitle: Activate, edit, or remove the cellular profiles on this device.
view.delete_description: This removes the profile from the device. Any schedule bound to it is cleared. This cannot be undone.
view.mismatch_note: The SIM in the modem does not match this profile's ICCID. The device keeps its current settings until a matching SIM is inserted.

table.empty_row: No profiles yet. Create one to get started.

delete_confirm.title: Delete Profile
delete_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone. Deleting this profile won't change your current modem configuration.

form.create_description: Create a custom SIM profile with specific APN, TTL, and IMEI settings.

fields.sim_iccid_duplicate: A profile with this SIM ICCID already exists.
fields.imei_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current IMEI
fields.sim_iccid_hint: Leave blank to apply this profile to any SIM.
fields.imei_danger: Changing the IMEI rewrites the modem identity and reboots the modem on activation. Leave blank to keep the current IMEI.

scenario.section_description: Bind this profile to a connection scenario, applied automatically when the profile activates. Optionally schedule different scenarios by time of day.
scenario.default_hint: Applied when this profile activates, and used as the fallback for any time not covered by the schedule below.
scenario.schedule_toggle_hint: Switch scenarios automatically on a daily timetable.
scenario.entries_cap_hint: Up to {{max}} time windows. Remove one to add another.
scenario.empty_schedule_hint: No windows yet — this behaves the same as just using {{name}}.
scenario.overlap_warning: This window overlaps another. When windows overlap, the topmost one wins.
scenario.schedule_invalid: Fix the highlighted schedule entries before saving.

block_errors.zero_length: Start and end times must differ.

steps.advanced_desc: Rarely needed. Leave these untouched unless you specifically need to change them.
steps.scenario_desc: Choose the scenario applied when this profile activates, and optionally schedule changes through the day.

sections.identity_desc: Name this profile and pick the carrier it is for.
sections.apn_desc: How the modem connects to the carrier data network.
sections.advanced_desc: Rarely needed. Change these only if you know you must.

summary.title: Preview
summary.desc: How this profile reads in your registry, and what it changes when activated.
summary.reboot_note: Activating reboots the modem to apply the IMEI change.

discard_dialog.title: Discard changes?
discard_dialog.description: You have unsaved changes. Leaving now will discard them.

form.add_description: Add a new cellular profile to your device.
form.edit_description_simple: Update this cellular profile, then save your changes.
form.network_desc: How the modem connects to the carrier data network.
form.identity_load_hint: Name this profile and pick the carrier it is for.
form.sim_iccid_hint_inline: Identifies which SIM this profile is for.
form.mno_hint: You may select pre-configured mobile network operators here.
form.scenario_desc_inline: Choose the scenario this profile runs, and optionally switch scenario at set times of day.
form.default_scenario_hint: Runs whenever no schedule window is active.
form.schedule_inline_hint: Switch scenario inside up to two daily windows.
form.windows_empty: No windows yet. Add one to switch scenario at a set time.
form.review_desc_add: Review your profile, then add it to the device.
form.review_desc_edit: Review your profile, then save your changes.

activate_dialog.title: Activate Profile
activate_dialog.description: Apply "{{name}}" to the modem? This will update APN, TTL/HL, and IMEI settings as configured in the profile. Unchanged settings will be skipped.

deactivate_dialog.title: Deactivate Profile
deactivate_dialog.description: Clear the active profile marker? The modem's current settings (APN, IMEI, TTL) will not be reverted — only the "Active" badge will be removed.

apply_dialog.title: Applying Profile
apply_dialog.reboot_notice: Modem is restarting to apply IMEI change. Dashboard will reconnect automatically.
apply_dialog.complete_sub: All applicable settings are now on the modem.
apply_dialog.partial_sub: Some steps were skipped. Review the details below.
apply_dialog.failed_sub: The modem was not fully reconfigured.

empty_state.title: No Custom Profiles
empty_state.description: Manage your custom SIM profiles here.
empty_state.description_full: You have not created any custom SIM profiles yet. Use the form to create your first profile.
empty_state.card_description: Saved bundles of APN, IMEI, and TTL settings applied to the modem in one step.
empty_state.teaching_body: A Custom SIM Profile bundles APN name, IP protocol, TTL/HL overrides, and an optional IMEI into one saved preset. Activating it applies every setting at once, so switching carriers or SIM slots takes seconds instead of manual re-entry.

active_card.none_description: The modem is using its current settings. Activate a saved profile to apply a bundle.
active_card.subtitle: Applied to the modem now
active_card.mismatch_note: This profile was built for a different SIM than the one inserted now. Reactivate it for this SIM, or activate the profile that matches.

list.detail_unavailable: Could not load this profile’s settings.
list.only_active_hint: Your only profile is the active one. Create another to switch between setups.

edit.not_found_desc: This profile may have been deleted. Return to your saved profiles.
